titleStmt.title: SII 24.119: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 119. (A.R. No. 340 of 1952-53.) III PRĀKĀRA, PAVITRA-MAṆḌAPA, INNER WALL, RIGHT OF THE ĀRYABHAṬṬĀḶ-VĀŚAL.

summary.p: Commences with the same praśasti as No. 114 above. Registers a sale of one vēli of 2,000 kuḻi of 28-2-340 kōl of sand-silted fallow land in Teṉkarai- Vaḷattūr-nāḍu for 2 kāśu for a stipulated quantity of paddy to be given into the temple granary by the temple officials at the instance of Rāja Vijjādira Birumma-mārāyar (Vidyādhara Brahma-mahārāyar), the Śrīkāryam of the temple, to Vijayarāyar alias Tiruvēṅgaḍavaṉ-Dēvaṉ of Paṉṟimaṅgalam in Nallūr-nāḍu in Nittavinōda-vaḷanāḍu, for being reclaimed and made into a flower garden under the name Kēśavanviḷāgam by Perumbuliyūr Svāmibhaktan. The record is dated in the 13th year of reign of the king, the details of the date being Vṛiśchika. śu. 13 (wrong for 3) Wednesday, Mūla, corresponding regularly to A.D. 1130, November 5, Wednesday; ·98; ·78.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
... svasti śrīḥ pūmālai miṭaintu ponmālai tikaḻttara pāmālai malinta parumaṇit tiraḷpuyattirunilamaṭantaiyoṭu jayamakaḷiruppat tanvarai mārvat taṉak kenap peṟṟa tirumakaḷorutani yiruppa kalaimakaḷ coṟṟiṟam puṇarnta kaṟpinaḷāki viruppoṭu nāvakattiruppa ticaitoṟum ti
kiriyoṭum ceṅkol naṭappa Akilapuvanamum kavippator putumatipola veṇkuṭai mimicai niṟppak karuṅkali Oḷittu van pilattiṭaik kiṭappa kuḷattiṭait teluṅkaṉviman vilaṅka mimicai yeṟavum kaliṅka pūmiyaik kanaleri parukavum Aiyampaṭaip paruvattu vempaṭai tāṅki veṅkai maṇṭalat tā
ṅkinitiruntu vaṭaticai Aṭippaṭuttaruḷit tenticait tarumamum tavamum tānamum taḻaippa vetamum memmaiyum Ātiukam polat talaittalaic ciṟappa vantaruḷi velaṟkarum por puliyāṇai pārttivar cūṭa niṟaimaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭi maṉṉuyirk kellām InnuḻiRead iṉṉuyirrttāy pol tannoḷi parappita tanit tani paran
tu maṇmuḻutum kaḷippa manuneṟi vaḷarttu tan koṟṟavācalp puṟattu maṇināvoṭuṅka muraicukaḷ muḻaṅka vijaiyamum pukaḻum melmeloṅka Ūḻi Ūḻi Immānilaṅcākka tirumaṇippoṟṟeṭṭeḻutu puttāṇṭu varumuṟai munnam mannavar cumantu tiṟai niraittuc corinta cempoṟ kuvaiyāl tan kulanāyakan tāṇṭavam puriyum
cempon Ampalañcūḻ tirumāḷikai kopuravācal kūṭacāḷaramum Ulaku valaṅkoṇṭoḷi viḷaṅku nemik kulavarai Utaiyak kuṉṟamoṭu niṉṟeṉap pacumpon meyntu palivaḷar piṭamum vicumpoḷi taḻaippa viḷaṅku pon meyntu Irunilan taḻaippa Imaiyavar kaḷippap periya tirunāḷp perum piyar viḻā
venum Uyar puraṭṭātiyil Uttiraṭṭātiyil Ampalam niṟainta Aṟputak kūttar Inparvāḻa Eḻuntaruḷutaṟkut tirutt(o)k koyil cempon meyntu paruttiraḷ muttin payil vaṭam parappi niṟaimaṇi māḷikai neṭunter vīti tantiruvaḷar perāl ceytu camaittaruḷi paim poṟ kuḻitta parikala mutalāl cempoṟ kaṟpakatte(r)oṭu pariccinnam Aḷavillā
tana Oḷipeṟa vamaittu pattāmāṇṭu cittirait tirunāḷ Attam peṟṟa Ātitta vārattut tiruvaḷar patiyil tirayodaśippakkattu Innana palavum Initu camaittaruḷi tan Oru kuṭai niḻalāl taraṇimuḻutum taḻaippa ceḻiyar veñcuram puka ceralar kaṭal puka Aḻitaru ciṅkaṇar Añci neñcalamara kaṅkar tiṟaiyiṭa kanniṭar venniṭa koṅkarotuṅka koṅkaṇa
r cāya maṟṟetticai mannarum tantamakkaraṇena tirumalarc cevaṭi Urimaiyi liṟañci terivaiyir tilatam tiyāka patākai purikuḻal maṭappiṭi punita kuṇavanitai tiripuvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷivaḷeṉ tiruvuḷḷattaruḷu muḻutu ṭaiyāḷoṭum ne[ṭu*m]aālākattut tirumakaḷiruntu mātar maṭamayilRead pūtalattaruntati araṇiyakaṟpilputalat taruntuti Araṇiya kaṟpakattaraṇi muḻutuṭaiyavaḷo
ṭum cempon vīrasiṅhāsanattu tiripuvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāna tiripuvanacakkaravattikaḷ śrī vikkiramacoḻātevaṟku yāṇṭu patinmunṟāvatu viriccika nāyaṟṟu pūruvva pakṣattu tiraiyodaciyum putankiḻamai
yum peṟṟa mūlattināḷ pāṇṭikulācani vaḷanāṭṭu viḷā nāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkat tāḻvārkku śrīkāriyam ceykiṟa rājavijjātirapiṟummamārāyar Evalpaṭi nila vilaiyāvaṇam Ikkoyilil śrīvayiṣṇavakkaṇkāṇi ceyvāril paravaicceri Āṇṭā num tiruviṇṇakar nampiyum Aṇi
araṅkadāsarum Arumārit tirukkaḻakkaṇṭarum śrīkārimāṟa nampiyum Arumārittāsarum kantāṭait tirumaṅkaiyāḷinampiyum paḷḷikoṇṭān paṭṭarum Iṭavai nārāyaṇa nampiyum nālūr vaṇkurukūran kāṟi nampiyum śrīvayiṣṇava vāriyaril kaṭalaṅkuṭi Āyanum tirumaṇaṟtūṇamu
tum ci caṭakopa nampiyum ci caṭakopa dāsarum makiḻalaṅkāṟadāsarum vīṟṟiruntā nampiyum tirumalaiyāṇṭār pāratāyan cirāman Ārāvamutan Arumāri nampiyum Āritan puṇṭarīkanum Ārāvamutāna cipuṇṭarika nampiyum pāratāyan karuṇākaran cirāma paṭṭanum pāratāyan tiruvākkula muṭaiyān tiruvaraṅkamāḷi paṭṭanum kavuṇiyan tiru
varaṅka tevanum Āṭkoṇṭa villipaṭṭanum pāratāyan cirāman nāraciṅka paṭṭanum koyil kaṇakku tiruvaraṅkap piriyanum Uḷḷiṭṭa kanmikaḷom nittavinota vaḷanāṭṭu nallūr nāṭṭup panṟimaṅkalattup panṟimaṅkalamuṭaiyān tiruveṅkaṭavan tevanāna vicaiyarāyaṟku Ittiruppatiyirukkum śrīvaiṣṇavaril perumpuli
yūr cuvāmipaktan Ivvicaiyarkku naratevanennum perāl ceykiṟa tirunantavānaṅ kaḷukku tennoḻukil ceykiṟa cināratevan tirunantavānattuk kiḻpāṟkellai cakkarapāṇi tirunantavanattu meṟku tenpāṟkellai kāveri tennāṟṟu vaṭakulaikku vaṭakku miypāṟkellai Akaḷaṅkan
kālukku kiḻakkum periya tirunan=tavānattu tirukkaṇṭikaikkut teṟkum Innam Ivark ke ceykiṟa tirunantavanattukku vaṭavoḻukil mummuṭi coḻanil melaiy paṇṇai yil cilottam tirunantavanattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai tillaiyu villiḷ dāsaṉ tirunantavanattukkut teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai cakkirapāṇi nampi tirunan=ta vanattukku meṟkum ten
pāṟkellai cirāmatāsan tirunan=tavānattukku vaṭakkum Āka Ivvicainta peru nānkellaikaḷil Uḷmikitik kuṟaivuḷḷaṭaṅkat taṭi Iraṇṭināl nilaṅkāl In nilaṅ kālukkum tirunan=tavanappuṟamāka Ivvicaiyarāyaṟku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭukkiṟa nilamāvatu Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭa
m tenkarai vaḷattūr nāṭṭut taṇṭuṟai munpillāṇṭukaḷ maṇaliṭṭup payir ceyya Uṇṇātu pāḻkiṭan=ta nilattu Ivaṟku viṟkuṟa nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai varatuṅka viḷākattu meṟkum tenpāṟkellai koṅkap peruvaḻiyāna jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻavāykkālukku vaṭakkum meypāṟ kellai
kalai vaṭṭamaṇiulakamuṇṭān tāsan viḷākattukkuk kiḻai maṇṇilaikkuk kiḻakkum pavaḻakkuṟu viḷākattu kiḻai maṇṇilaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellaiy viḷākañceykiṟa kāverikkulaikkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta perunānkellai Uḷ naṭuvu paṭṭa kecuva viḷākamenṟu per kūvappaṭṭa maṇaliṭṭukku mikaikol 8 10
m vaṭakai kiḻakku nokki varatuṅka viḷāka muṟak kol Irupatteṭṭaraiye Oru māvaraiyum kīḻkai teṟku nokkik kol Aṟupatum tenkai teṟkku nokkik kol Irupatteṭṭaraiye Oru māvaraiyum Āka van=ta kuḻi Iraṇṭā yirattināl nilam veli Innilam veliyum Ivaṟku viṟṟukku
ṭuttu koḷḷuvatāna Emmilicainta vilaiyporuḷ Anṟāṭu naṟkācu Iraṇṭu Ikkācu Iraṇṭum śrī paṇṭāratte Oṭukkuvittukkoṇṭu Innilam veliyum viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Ivvicaiyarāyaṟku Ivvaṉaivom Innilam veliyum tiruttaṟa tirutti puṉcey vari(va)cai paḷḷikkoṇṭānennum marakkālāle Āṇṭu varai Eṇ
kala nellum tiruvaraṅkatevar śrīpaṇṭāratte Aḷantu taravu koḷḷak kaṭava nākavum Ippuñcey varicai Iṟutti mikutikoṇṭu Innaratevan tirunantavānañ ceykiṟa Āḷ muvaṟku nāḷ Oṉṟukku mukkuṟuṇi nānāḻi Āka vantu nellum Āṇṭuvarai puṭavai mutalukkuk kācu munṟaraiyum Innilattil mikutikoṇṭu ceyyak
kaṭavānākavum Ippaṭi ceyyumiṭattu Ipperumpuliyūr cuvāmittarum Ivan vaṟkattārum viḷākaṅ koṇṭu Ittirunantavānañ ceyyak kaṭavarākavum In nilattukku varicai Antarāyam makamai pa �ṭai poṉ maṟṟum tiruvācalil ponta kuṭimai Epperppaṭṭatum ceyyakkaṭavarallā tārākavum
ipparicu sammatittu Itu kalveṭṭik koḷḷakkaṭavārāka sammatittu Ippanṟi maṅkalamuṭaiyān tiruveṅkaṭavan tevanāna vicaiyarāyaṟkku viṟṟukkuṭuttom Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷ kanmikaḷom Ivarkaḷ paṇi
kka Eḻutinen tiruvaraṅkappiriyan karaṇattār pāṇṭikulācani vaḷanāṭṭu puṟakki ḷiyūr nāṭṭu brahmadeyam taḷapati maṅkalattu madhyasthan taḷapatimaṅkalamuṭai yāṉ Ariyeṟu kovintanen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ivaiparavaic ceri Āṇṭār sayiññaiyātanamaikku tiruvaraṅkap perumāḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭiyaṟiven kantāṭai tirumaṅkai
yāḷi Eḻuttu Ippaṭiyaṟiven paravaicceric ciykārimāṟa neḻuttu Ippaṭiyaṟi ven tirumāliruñ colai dāsanen Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tirumaṇaṟṟūṇa mutan sayiñ Ātanamaikku perumpuliyūr nārāyaṇa nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven Iṭavai nārāyaṇa nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭiyaṟiven Irāyūr caṭakopaneḻuttu Ippaṭi yaṟiven Aṇiyaraṅka dāsaneḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiven Arumārit tirukkaṇṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai periyakoyil dāsa neḻuttu Ippaṭi Ivai ciri caṭakopadāsan Eḻuttu (ippaṭi) Ippaṭikku Ivai pārataāyan cirāman vaṭakopuramuṭaiyāneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Āṭkoṇṭa villi paṭṭaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruviṇṇakar nampi sayiññaiyātanamaikku perum puliyūr vaṇṭuvarāpatinampi Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai naragopaṇa kurukūr nakkaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai muṅkilkuṭi mati makiḻalaṅkāṟa dāsaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Irāyūr paḷḷikoṇṭān paṭṭaneḻuttu kaṭalaṅkuṭi ci kṛṣṇapaṭṭaneḻuttu Āritan cirākavaneḻuttu ci puṇṭarīka nampi Eḻuttu pāratāyan kāṇikkaraāna cirāmapaṭṭan sayiññaiyātanamaikku kāśyapan nārāyaṇaṉ Aḻakiya
ttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pāratāyan cirāman Arumāri nampi Eḻuttu pāratāyan tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyānāna tiruvaraṅkamāḷipaṭṭaneḻuttu Itu śrīvaiṣṇavarakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 24.119 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
